title: Old Trusty
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''"Old Trusty"''' was the name of an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage distilled by settlers on [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
